name: icon-font-preview
description: VS Code extension to preview icons from custom fonts directly in your code editor

commands.title: Icon Font Preview: Reload CSS font file
Icon Font Preview: Open Icon Browser

iconFontPreview.cssFile.description: Path to your icon font CSS file (absolute or relative to workspace root). E.g. ./assets/icons/my-icons.css

iconFontPreview.fontFile.description: Path to your .ttf or .woff font file (absolute or relative to CSS file). Leave empty to auto-detect from CSS @font-face.

iconFontPreview.classPrefix.description: Icon class prefix to detect in your files. E.g. 'icon-', 'fa-', 'ri-'. Leave empty to auto-detect from CSS.

iconFontPreview.triggerCharacters.description: Characters that trigger autocomplete for icon names.

iconFontPreview.languages.description: Languages where icon preview and autocomplete are active.

iconFontPreview.decorationColor.description: Color of the inline icon preview glyph.
